title: Ralph PRD
description: Product Requirements Document format for the Ralph autonomous agent runner

branchName.description: Git branch name for this feature (e.g., feature/my-feature)

userStories.description: Ordered list of user stories to implement

_source.description: Path to the PRD file that was converted to produce this aes.json (e.g. tasks/prd-my-feature/prd-review-fixes.md)

description.description: Full user story (As a ... I want ... so that ...)

implementationNotes.description: Array of implementation notes describing the technical approach: which files to touch, patterns to follow, design decisions, gotchas. Generated by Opus during PRD creation.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Acceptance criteria; last entries should be the build/test commands

passes.description: Set to true by Ralph when all acceptance criteria are met

dependsOn.description: IDs of stories that must pass before this story can start

preservationConstraints.description: Files, functions, or importable symbols that must NOT be deleted or broken by this story. Each entry is checked after the story completes: file paths must still exist, Python symbols must still be importable. Failing any entry causes the story to be treated as incomplete.

notes.description: Optional notes or context for the agent implementing this story

riskLevel.description: Risk level of the story; riskLevel:high forces Opus model selection

complexity.description: Complexity of the story; drives automatic model tier selection (trivial→Haiku, standard→Sonnet, complex→Opus)

preferredModel.description: Explicit model override for this story (e.g., gpt-5.3-codex for terminal/CLI-heavy work). Takes priority over complexity and riskLevel.
